name: Paula
archetype: Arcanist casual player balancing real life and gaming
speech_patterns: Mentions time constraints and real-world schedules
Uses everyday language without fantasy jargon
quirks: Often mentions she can only play for an hour or two
Appreciates when people explain mechanics clearly
example_phrases: Got time for a quick dungeon run before I log? Maybe 30 minutes?
Honestly this quest chain is pretty good for the time investment.
Real talk, can someone explain the boss mechanics? I've only done this once.
Works for me. I'm free after work tomorrow if you need a DPS.
Decent loot for a Tuesday night run. Same time next week?
